videos.headline: 'Let Brady cook!' Missouri QB takes it himself for thrilling TD
videos.description: Brady Cook cuts away from a defender and lunges into the end zone to put Missouri in front against Boston College.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ('Let Brady cook!' Missouri QB takes it himself for thrilling TD) 2024/9/14

videos.headline: Castellanos dimes Bradley as Boston College strikes first
videos.description: Boston College gets on the board first against Missouri as Thomas Castellanos throws a 12-yard TD to Jerand Bradley.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Castellanos dimes Bradley as Boston College strikes first) 2024/9/14

videos.headline: Castellanos turns near-fumble into a 67-yard Boston College TD
videos.description: Thomas Castellanos almost loses the football during the snap, but somehow recovers and connects with Reed Harris for a 67-yard TD against Missouri.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Castellanos turns near-fumble into a 67-yard Boston College TD) 2024/9/14

videos.headline: Luther Burden III scores shifty 19-yard TD for Missouri
videos.description: Missouri's Luther Burden III spins out of a tackle and takes a 19-yard reception to the house against Boston College.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Luther Burden III scores shifty 19-yard TD for Missouri) 2024/9/14

videos.headline: BC's Castellanos, Morales connect for late TD vs. Missouri
videos.description: Boston College's Thomas Castellanos finds Kamari Morales for a 38-yard TD late in the fourth quarter to bring the game within one score.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (BC's Castellanos, Morales connect for late TD vs. Missouri) 2024/09/14 ESHEET
